name: APEX-024-25 Password Reset Token Poisoning
description: A Django application vulnerable to Host header injection in password reset flow, allowing account takeover by poisoning reset URLs
hint: 密码重置邮件中的链接地址受Host请求头影响，篡改该头部可劫持重置令牌
vulnerability_types: CWE-644: Improper Neutralization of HTTP Headers
